texto: People SHOULD be doubted. Many people misunderstand this concept. Doubting people is just a part of getting to know them. What many people call ‘trust’ is really just giving up on trying to understand others, and that very act is far worse than doubting. It is actually ‘apathy.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Shinobu Kaitani sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “People SHOULD be doubted. Many people misunderstand this concept. Doubting people is just a part …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, doubt, game, útil em momentos de game e kaitani.
